name: 106 Main
description: We’re dedicated to making sure your time with us is unlike anything else you’ve experienced. Our professional crew behind the bar has carefully curated a list of world-renowned drinks that leave your mouth buzzing with layers of flavor. Don’t believe us? Come on by and see for yourself.

name: Aaktun Coffee + Bar
description: Aaktun coffee & Bar has a cozy atmosphere, friendly staff, and a menu bursting with mouthwatering dishes, it’s the perfect place to unwind and savor a delightful meal. Aaktun Coffee & Bar offers a relaxed setting with creative beverages and breakfast sandwiches.

name: Afters Dessert Bar
description: A Dessert Bar serving small bites, cookie cakes, rotating seasonal desserts. Tucked away in Brightleaf Square. Chocolate chip cookies and chocolate boxes to single-serving coffee cakes, caramel brownies, and chocolate crémeux. Take-out, eat-in, catering and more.

name: Alimentari at Mothers & Sons
description: Alimentari provides lunch, fresh pasta, sauces, cheeses, imported Italian specialties as well as fresh local produce and prepared foods. Each week they offer a selection of take and bake entrees and meal kits for you, your friends and family. Great spot to grab a midday sandwich.

name: allday at Unscripted Hotel
description: allday is our take on a sundries market meets high end coffee bar/restaurant, designed to fit into your lifestyle morning, noon and night. It is the perfect place for you to grab a hearty breakfast, a quick snack or a cool sit down dinner.

name: Alley Twenty Six
description: A local cocktail bar and restaurant located in downtown Durham featuring upscale food and cocktail pairings in a relaxed setting.

name: Anjappar
description: Anjappar is serving a uthentic South Indian food . Dosas, curreis and kottu parota. Great lunch specials. Delicate flavors expertly combined to bring you an authentic taste of India.

name: Annexe
description: Voted Best Late Night by Durham Magazine in 2022, Annexe is all about tasty adult beverages. Offers Bar Virgile’s menu most nights.

name: Arcana Bar
description: Arcana provides a cozy, comfortable, intimate bar space. Wines, craft beers, and modern cocktails. Arcana is a space for artists, live performances, theater, dance, intimate conversation, and unwinding.

name: Ashleigh Bakes Daily
description: At Ashleigh Bakes Daily, we believe in the magic of homemade. Every dessert is hand-mixed—no machines, just love and tradition. From the first bite, our cookies take you back to childhood, evoking nostalgia and comfort with every crumb. And because we care about the planet as much as we care about taste, all our treats are packaged in eco-friendly containers that preserve freshness for whenever yo

name: Atomic Clock Brewing Co.
description: A brewery & taproom in downtown Durham offering a wide selection of craft beers as well as cocktails, wine, and a full-service kitchen.

name: Auctioneer Bar (Durham Food Hall)
description: Durham Food Hall’s centrally-located bar offers seasonal cocktails along with thoughtfully curated beer, wine, and spirits selections – all designed to highlight our vendors’ cuisines and spotlight local breweries and distilleries. With a 360 bar, the Auctioneer is a friendly, inclusive space for friends and strangers alike – whether you’re posting up to enjoy your food, or meeting to celebrate on

name: Bar Virgile
description: Bar Virgile, located in the heart of downtown Durham, is a restaurant and bar specializing in craft and classic cocktails as well as an ever changing dinner and small plates menu. We source our products from the area’s best purveyors, and we rely on a dynamic in-house team to execute a high quality, high standard operation. You’ll always find friendly and knowledgeable service, a bustling atmosphe

name: Barsa
description: Barsa takes beloved Indian flavors and reimagines them with a modern twist, creating a menu that is both nostalgic and refreshingly new. From authentic street food inspirations to contemporary, chef-driven creations, every dish is crafted with precision, passion, and a touch of innovation.

name: Baryo Bar + Coffee
description: Coffee, cocktails, trivia, karaoke. Neighborhood bar with good vibes.

name: Boricua Soul
description: Mixing and experimenting with foods and techniques of our grandmother’s kitchen’s led us to many thoughts, discussions and learning about two very different cuisines with similar roots. Both cuisines were the by-product of mixing of West African, Native Indian and European ingredients and techniques as a result of the African slave trade. These foods tell the story and act as a vehicle to transpor

name: Boxcar Bar + Arcade
description: Let the games begin! Our third location in downtown Durham, NC is now open! Located at 621 Foster Street, our newest location overlooks the historic Durham Athletic Park, at the corner of Foster + Geer Streets and offers over 70 arcade games, a full bar including 24 craft American drafts (and featuring a wide variety of local beer, liquor and wine), private event space and a Neapolitan-style pizza

name: Bull City Burger and Brewery
description: “Eat Pasture Raised Beef, Drink Fresh Beer.”- Bull City Burger and Brewery. Bull City Burger and Brewery is located in downtown Durham, NC. Our beef is local pasture raised with no added hormone and antibiotic free. We source as many local ingredients as possible to make everything from scratch. We are Back to Scratch.

name: Bull City Ciderworks
description: The BULL doesn’t play by the rules. Hard cider doesn’t have to be sickeningly sweet and taste artificial. Our ciders are made with 100% apple juice and never back-sweetened with high fructose corn syrup, so you taste the apple in all its glory! Gluten-free yeast and ingredients ensure a naturally gluten-free cider. We’re crafting unique ciders that bridge the gap between wine and beer. Honey, blac

name: Bull McCabe’s Irish Pub
description: Located at the historic five points intersection in downtown Durham with indoor & outdoor seating, both on a heated, enclosed patio and open lawn, Bull McCabe’s is the beating heart of the city. Whether it’s a premier league derby matchup, a festive party, or a casual business meeting, if it’s happening in Durham, it’s probably happening at Bull McCabe’s. There’s no better place to make a new frie

name: Cheeni
description: Cheeni serves classic tiffin, the Indian word for “snacks”, such as filter coffee imported from India, masala chai reminiscent of bustling street stalls, and Indian Street Style toast, more commonly known as “chili cheese toast”.

name: Clouds Brewcade + Kitchen
description: In October 2016, we opened in Durham’s Brightleaf Square. We have a German inspired menu with 50 taps (30 of our own brews, with 20 guest taps). We are home to the Down Pour wall, a 10 tap self-pour beer wall. Our patio is dog-friendly!

name: Cocoa Cinnamon
description: Latina Led, open-hearted, and determined to connect commerce to human flourishing.

name: Conniption Bar & Lounge
description: Not a gin lover (yet)? No worries. Our menu includes a wide range of spirits, local beer, wine, and an ever-changing lineup of small bites designed for snacking, sharing, and savoring.

name: Convivio
description: Authentic Italian fine dining experience complete with organic house selected wine.

name: Corner Yaki (Durham Food Hall)
description: Fueled by passion and made with love! The friendly Corner Yaki showcases a melting pot of flavors from Asia while showcasing North Carolina’s local bounty.

name: Coupe & Stein Champagne Bar
description: Step into Coupe & Stein, Durham’s newest destination for refined relaxation and lively gatherings. Our beautifully curated space, complete with a charming pink piano, invites you to unwind with a glass of champagne, crafted cocktail, or one of our exclusive selections. With elegant decor, warm lighting, and a welcoming atmosphere, Coupe & Stein is the perfect backdrop for intimate conversations an

name: Crank Arm Brewing
description: Crank Arm Brewing started with the dream of combining our two passions: bikes and beer. We finally made that dream a reality when we opened our doors in July of 2013 in the heart of the warehouse district in downtown Raleigh, NC.

name: Cucciolo Osteria
street: 8744 Address 601 W Main St, Suite C

name: Cugino Forno
description: Are you ready to embark on the most affordable trip your mouth will ever take to Italy?!? Staying true to tradition, our Pizza Napoletana is as authentic as it gets! Using Mozzarella di Bufala made for us earlier in the week in a small town in Campania.

name: Dashi
description: Indy Week readers voted Dashi as Best Japanese Restaurant in Durham and Best New Restaurant in Durham, and Dashi was runner up for Best New Business in Durham and received an honorable mention for Best Late Night Meal in Durham! Dashi has been featured in regional and national publications, including Food and Wine Magazine, Saveur, and Tasting Table.

name: Delancey Tavern
description: Delancey Tavern is a contemporary American bistro and bar located at 408 W Geer St. in downtown Durham.

name: Devine’s Grill and Sports Bar
description: A large menu filled with All-American favorites like wings, burgers, chicken, soups, salads and deli sandwiches. 12 beers on draft, over 50 bottled beers and a wide selection of wine and mixed drinks. Every sports package available, for the ultimate big game viewing experience plus live entertainment.

name: Dram & Draught
description: Serving whiskeys from around the world, hand-crafted cocktails, draught beer from Raleigh and beyond, and wines from the old world and new.

name: DSSOLVR
description: DSSOLVR’s Durham Taproom is our newest hub for all our surreal offerings. Drop in for a pour of our beer, wine, cider, or hard seltzer! OH WAIT A SEC! We now have Hot Drinks and Jello shots too!!

name: Durham Distillery
description: Today, Melissa and Lee want you to have a Conniption. After a long work day, go home, pour yourself a G & T or make yourself a martini made with our American Dry, Navy Strength or the newest Conniption Gin: Kinship , and start your own cocktail hour tradition.

name: Durham Food Hall
description: American , Bakery and Desserts , Bars and Pubs , Coffee Tea and Other Beverages , Indian , Italian and Pizza , Mexican , Pan-Asian , Seafood , Wine & Beer

name: Durty Bull Brewing Company
description: Local, bold, artisanal beer cultured in Durham, NC. Old world brewing techniques blended with creativity and passion, Durty Bull Brewing Company is a 15-barrel craft brewery and tasting room specializing in barrel aged and sour beers as well as other unconventional offerings brewed for the residents of The Bull City and beyond.

name: Emmy Squared Pizza
description: We look forward to welcoming you to Emmy Squared Durham and sharing our unique take on American “comfort food.”

name: EO’s Athletic Club
description: A sports bar for everyone. Just opened on W Main St. and having a ball!

name: Eve
description: We built Eve to be more than a bar . A low-lit jewel box of a room thick with shadow and green, where vines creep and leaves spill. A modern garden after dark. A place to gather, rest, conspire and celebrate. For slow confessions and late nights, for delighting, reveling, and becoming.

name: Everything Bagels (Durham Food Hall)
description: Gourmet bagels made in house to create avant-garde bagel sandwiches and bagel-burgers.

name: Ex-Voto Cocina Nixtamal (Durham Food Hall)
description: Ex-Voto offers fast-casual Mexican food that is playful while still being rooted in tradition and intention. We nixtamalize and grind Oaxacan heirloom corn in-house to produce the best possible masa for our tamales, and all of our salsas and cremas are made from scratch using the freshest NC produce, herbs, and spices we can. The result is something special – cravable comfort food that keeps you c

name: Fare&Fellow
description: Picture this: a cozy spot in NC, where you can enjoy a cup of your favorite coffee with your go-to barista, indulge in chef-inspired Fares, and cozy up for heartwarming conversation with your favorite Fellows.

name: Fizzwerks
description: We get it, not everyone is a big drinker for any number of reasons, but you should still be included. We want FIZZWERKS to be your Third Space. By layering ingredients like fresh fruit, botanicals, teas, and even mushrooms, we’ve crafted no/low alcoholic beverages with all the flavor you would expect in your favorite cocktail.

name: Flavor Hills
description: Their mantra is simple yet profound – Eat, Laugh, Drink – and it resonates through every facet of their establishment. Flavor Hills offers brunch, specialties like shrimp and grits, and a wide variety of salads, sandwiches and breakfast items.

name: Flying Bull Beer Company Restaurant and Brewery
description: Flying Bull Beer Company’s newest location in the beautiful Innovation District is proud to offer craft beer, a sophisticated bar with custom cocktails, and small and large plates of international cuisine.

name: Fonda Lupita
description: At Fonda Lupita we make traditional Mexican homemade food from recipes past on from generations selling food in Queretaro Mexico. Our mission is to bring those flavors to Durham for people that haven’t tried this kind of Mexican cuisine. We make fresh hand made corn tortillas and gorditas, our salsas are made with fresh roasted peppers and tomatillos to provide high-quality food.

name: Foster Street Coffee
description: Foster Street Coffee feels like home. We take inspiration from around the world and bring this to the people of Durham, North Carolina. Using incredible local produce and our amazing coffee and espresso beans, we strive to be your hometown coffee shop.

name: Fullsteam Brewery
description: After fourteen years as an anchor of the Rigsbee/Geer neighborhood, we’re ready for the next chapter: scalable production at a brewery nearby, and a new, 9,000 square foot welcome center in the Boiler Room of the historic American Tobacco Campus.

name: Geer Street Garden
description: Geer Street Garden serves simple, down home food and drinks in a relaxed atmosphere. The basic idea is that everyday food should be wholesome and delicious. We have a large outdoor patio that’s a perfect place to meet your friends and neighbors for a pint of beer and a local pasture raised burger.

name: GoJo
description: Gojo is a Durham-based Coffee shop and lounge. Serving locally roasted coffee beans, a wide variety of teas, as well as locally sourced pastries by morning, and a lunch menu rich in Ethiopian flavors starring in options ranging from protein and vegan bowls to panini, Gojo is sure to have something to please every appetite. We strive to provide a warm experience in our cozy space and look forward t

name: Goorsha
description: Goorsha serves traditional Ethiopian fare like tibs (meat sauteed in spices) and shiro (chickpea stew) with a modern twist. Whether you select a communal plate to share or prefer an individual portion, each dish is crafted using local, organic ingredients to honor tradition, health, and of course, flavor.

name: Hi-Wire Brewing
description: Our journey began in the summer of 2013 in the heart of Asheville, NC’s South Slope Brewery District. With the 2015 opening of their Big Top Production Brewery up the road, the next next goal was to bring a bring a physical location to Durham, NC. The new taproom consists of 8,844 square feet of interior space, as well as a 1,678 square foot outdoor covered patio and beer garden. The space is game

name: High Dive
description: A stylish DIVE with games, beers, spirits, a vintage jukebox, and a great vibe. Pool, Darts, Foosball, Pinball and more.

name: Honeygirl Meadery
description: We make hand crafted meads, wines made with honey, and also ferment with added fruits, botanicals and flowers.

name: Insomnia Cookies
description: Insomnia Cookies pecializes in delivering warm, delicious cookies right to the doors of individuals and companies alike. Whether you’re feeding a craving or a crowd, Insomnia Cookies’ offerings of cookies, brownies, cookie cakes, ice-cream and even cold milk, has you covered.

name: It’s a Southern Thing
description: We here at It’s a Southern Thing have a passion for great food, great fun and great friends. We want all those things to happen here at our restaurant every day and work towards providing you with the best possible experience every time you swing on by.

name: Jeni’s Splendid Ice Cream
description: We build ice creams completely from scratch using a unique recipe honed and perfected over more than 20 years by our founder, Jeni Britton. Our ice creams have a uniquely smooth texture and buttercream body, with bright flavor and clean finish. We’re here to set new standards for ice cream classics and to create our own.

name: Juicekeys
description: We are a locally owned and operated Organic Juice and Smoothie Bar. Built by a brother and sister team, our mission is to provide ‘keys’ to great health. We are passionate about the synergies between nutrition, education, and leading an active lifestyle.

name: Killer Queen Wine Bar
description: Imagine if a disco ball and bottle of wine had a baby. That baby would be Killer Queen.

name: King’s Sandwich Shop
description: King’s sandwich shop, located in historic downtown Durham, has been serving up some of the best hot dogs, burgers, fries and shakes since 1942. Whether you stop by for a hot dog before the game at the old ball park or swing by on your lunch break for a juicy burgerâ we know you’ll love the fresh, delicious food and fast, friendly service!

name: La Mala
description: Our passion is bringing you Mexican inspired cocktails and authentic street food, made fresh every day. We are excited for you to try these unique, flavorful drinks and bar snacks. Our drinks are made to order from freshly squeezed fruits and our large collection of high quality tequilas. We look forward to sharing our food, culture, drinks, and hospitality with you, your family, and your friends!

name: Lady Gold Tacos at Remy’s Lounge
Liberty & Plenty Distillery
description: Our guiding objective is to contribute to and expand upon the spirits conversation by presenting unique takes on classic expressions on vodka, gins, rums and whiskies, that are rich with storytelling. We do that by blending tradition and excellence with inspired innovation, and with a commitment to creating timeless spirits that reflect the uniqueness of our communities, our selves, and our aspira

name: Little Barb’s Bakery (Durham Food Hall)
description: Little Barb’s vision is to create a bakery for all fellow cake lovers to come and get the cake of their dreams. I have always strived to take the concept from a customer and turn that into reality through desserts! Little Barb’s will always be a place you can come and express yourself through food, feel completely welcomed, and enjoy a simple yet beautiful dessert. It is simply just Durham’s frien

name: Little Pizza Box @ Ponysaurus
description: A taproom pizza joint in Durham’s Ponysaurus Brewing. Dine in, take out & Doordash delivery

name: Liturgy Beverage Company
description: Liturgy Beverage Company is a specialty coffee, tea, and chocolate company focused on connecting the work of farmers with the habits and rituals of our community in Durham. We specialize in single origin tea, coffee, and chocolate beverages designed to highlight the unique flavors of their regions.

name: Loaf
description: Located in the heart of downtown Durham, Loaf focuses on hearth-baked, sourdough breads and pastries. What started out of a backyard brick oven – as a hobby to share with friends and neighbors – quickly grew to a stall at the Downtown Durham Farmers Market and settled as a brick and mortar shop in 2011. Throughout the years Loaf has expanded its offerings, and partnered with local growers and make

name: Locals Oyster Bar & Seafood Butchery (Durham Food Hall)
description: Locals Oyster Bar is a taste of the coastline tucked into Durham Food Hall. Our menu is a celebration of North Carolina seafood, from raw oysters to fish sandwiches. Locals Oyster Bar will also operate a fish market stocked with fresh fish, oysters, smoked seafood, and more.

name: LocoShop
description: Order pops & scoops you love plus gifts & groceries from our sundries shop for delivery + pickup.

name: LouElla Wine, Beer & Beverage
description: Welcome to LouElla Wine, Beer & Beverage, downtown Durham’s neighborhood bottle shop, bar, and event space. We are proudly named after our owner’s Great Aunt LouElla, who exhibited warmth, hospitality, and a generous spirit. Today, we carry on her legacy, welcoming every guest with open arms and a full glass.

name: Luna Rotisserie & Empanadas
description: South American meets American South. Wood-fired rotisserie meats, Andean-inspired braises, empanadas and small plates.

name: M Kokko
description: M Kokko is a cozy space for casual chicken dishes with Korean and Japanese influences. Here our team is constantly experimenting and learning with the goal of improving each dish over time. We hope you will join us on this journey to explore different flavors and techniques.

name: M Pocha
description: Pocha is short for Pojanmacha in Korea. The exact definition of Pojanmacha is “Tented Cart on Wheels” that serves street food with drinks. Over the years, pojanmacha has developed more into a brick and mortar style and has similar feel that of Japanese style Izakaya. It will be a place that we serve food and dishes that we like to eat while drinking. Most will be small tapas style dishes to be sha

name: M Sushi
description: M Sushi is the Triangle’s first sushi restaurant dedicated solely to high-quality seafood. Our menu is small and purposeful, and uses only very special, seasonal seafood received directly from Japan, Korea, and the US. The quality of our dishes is a direct result of our dedication to fresh ingredients, and our emphasis placed on maintaining traditional Japanese cuisine with multiple influences fro

name: M Tempura
description: Our vision for M Tempura is to intensify the traditional tempura omakase style experience. We take exotic and seasonal high quality ingredients and elevate them with delicate frying technique. Our menu will feature select seafood and seasonal vegetables, as well as rich meats like Iberico pork from Spain. We hope to bring you a diverse and unique experience, one bite at a time.

name: Mango Indian Grill (Durham Food Hall)
description: Mango Indian Grill serves up contemporary South Indian-inspired dishes packed with flavor! You will find drool-worthy combo meals, finger foods, side dishes, and more. Gluten-free or Vegan? Don’t sweat. Mango Indian Grill offers several Gluten-free and Vegan options. Not to mention their tasty rose milk and mango lassi that pair perfectly with delish eats.

name: Mateo Bar de Tapas
description: Mateo’s features a menu that blends the flavors of Spain with beloved ingredients and dishes of the South. We offer a casual, yet refined, menu of Spanish small plates with a Southern inflection. Accompanying the food is a robust Spanish wine list as well as one of the largest sherry offerings in the country.

name: Maverick’s Smokehouse and Taproom
description: Maverick’s Smokehouse and Taproom is a downtown Durham restaurant featuring Carolina, Memphis and Texas style BBQ and more.

name: Mellow Mushroom
description: Mellow Mushroom is proud to serve Durham with delicious pizza, hoagies, calzones and salads. Wee use fresh ingredients on all our menu items. Mellow Mushroom is more than just a pizza restaurant; it is where Durham pizza lovers and beer lovers gather.

name: Ment Beverage Co.
description: Durham’s premiere meadery, Honeygirl Meadery, is now housed under Ment Beverage Co. All your favorite alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages in one location at American Tobacco Campus.

name: Mezcalito Grill and Tequila Bar
description: Mezcalito welcomes you to discover a unique take on Mexican cuisine with a Tex-Mex heart…A fascinating blend of both authentic, and fresh dishes, experiencing the bold flavors, and inspiring aromas that honor our Mexican heritage. Featuring classic favorites like chimichangas, enchiladas, quesadillas; as well as some more adventurous traditional meals such as the Chamorro, Molcajete, Ceviches, or

name: Mi Barrio
description: We are proud to serve you a variety of deliciously flavored and crafted traditional Mexican coffees , our favorite being Cafe de Olla. Providing alterantives is also important , have a refreshing tea, with agua fresca flavors, tajin and chamoy on the rim always an option. And our favorite for out fit fam, Protein Shakes, and Pre and Post workout drinks to keep you on track with your goals.

name: Miel Bon Bons
description: Miel Bon Bons Fine Chocolate & Cake Shop is a locally owned boutique-style bakery & chocolate shop committed to great desserts and great people. We ‘re not your typical bakery. Simply we love what we do. We are proud to be regarded as one of Raleigh- Durham -Chapel Hill city’s best dessert cateres. We served delicious 5-star hotel-quality desserts and present it with exquiste design. Our bake shop

name: MILKLAB (Durham Food Hall)
description: MILKLAB serves organic boba milk tea made fresh with real ingredients. MILKLAB stays true to their core values every step of the way: with only the best quality in their offerings, maximum customer and employee satisfaction, and an inviting, fun atmosphere with amazing aesthetics.

name: MilkShake Factory
description: At MilkShake Factory our motto is treat yourself to the simple joys in life. We want each visit to start and end with a smile. Our team in downtown Durham is serving up handspun milkshakes made with homemade ice cream alongside our legacy gourmet chocolate. Enjoy our signature Chocolatier milkshake, dairy free options, chocolate bark varieties and more!

name: Moe’s Southwest Grill
description: Welcome to Moe’s! We provide fresh, hand-made, customizable Southwestern food in a welcoming environment that rocks!

name: Mothers & Sons
description: Italian Trattoria located in the heart of downtown Durham. Featuring handmade pasta and wood fired fare by Matt Kelly and Josh DeCarolis of Mateo Tapas.

name: Nikos
street: BrightLeaf Square, 905 W Main St Unit 21B

name: Spring Rolls
street: Westbrook Shopping Center Food Lion, 3557 S Church St

name: The Restaurant at The Durham Hotel
The Roof at The Durham Hotel
WXYZ Bar at the Aloft Hotel
